title: rubus × rectisetus
intro: Rubus × rectisetus, also known as the Black Raspberry hybrid, is a cross between the Rubus argutus and Rubus occidentalis species, and is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus × rectisetus lie in its high content of antioxidants, anthocyanins, and other polyphenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × rectisetus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Rubus × rectisetus is often used to make jams, jellies, and teas, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
